shape_semantics: code cmp,vp,vpc,naive = _,W,L,W: value_profile AND naive resolve, value_profile_cmplog BLOCKS, cmplog non-decisive. ANTI-SYNERGY -- adding the I2S stage to value_profile (vpc = both techniques) HURTS: vpc loses to vp-alone and to naive. The verification question for every branch is WHY the extra I2S delta blocks what vp-alone resolves.

hypotheses.label: vpc's I2S substitution pins the corpus to a WRONG decoy literal (sibling case / enumerated case / valid-range boundary), flooding the loser corpus with a value that blocks the target arm

params.decoy_source: the sibling / enumerated-case / boundary literal named in why_loser_doesnt (e.g. MONGOLIAN/NKO tag for 5761, 0x11481 sibling for 6124_h0, the 0x0020/0x00A0/0x2006 case literals for 6263, the GSUB/GPOS table tags for 6162/6210, 0x20 space-class for 5683)
params.target_value: the W-resolving operand named in why_winner_satisfies

hypotheses.prediction: vpc's corpus is ENRICHED for the decoy literal relative to vp (decoy_enrich > 0) while NOT enriched for the target value (signed_target_enrich <= 0). G1-discriminating: pure overhead/throughput drain (the rival hypothesis) predicts NO directional byte-frequency difference between vpc and vp corpora at the gate offset (decoy_enrich ~ 0) -- it slows the loser without steering it to any specific value. G2-independent: it scores corpus BYTE frequencies at the gate offset, not the vpc resolve/block outcome that defined the shape.

non_discriminable.label: non-literal / derived-relation gate: I2S has no input-byte literal to substitute, so vpc pays pure CmpLog per-exec overhead and loses on throughput -- no value-level signature to measure
non_discriminable.why_non_discriminable: The only candidate signal is corpus-scale scheduling (vpc corpus inflated/throttled vs vp). (1) corpus_size is a global per-trial quantity confounded by every other branch and by raw exec count -- it cannot attribute a per-branch block to the I2S delta, and an inflated corpus is equally consistent with benign exploration. (2) For bloaty_301 (start>=end pointer relation, none_structural) and libpng_4072_h1 (derived idat_size length field) the gate has NO fixed-offset literal, so operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature -- there is nothing for I2S to enrich toward, by construction. (3) data_realities: I2S is untagged in mutation_op and value_profile is a feedback, so NO seed_lineage 'I2S-overhead event' or 'gradient event' is measurable. The anti-synergy here is a scheduling/throughput effect, which the step5b_new_v2 finding flagged as non-synthesizable and which is likewise non-discriminable from real campaign data. Honest fallback per G3: inconclusive.

data_realities_respected: on-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3 -> the decoy test scores ONLY the 8 harfbuzz branches; bloaty_301, lcms_2137, libpng_4072_h1 have no corpus and route to fallback inconclusive regardless of merit.

operand_enrichment needs a fixed-offset VALUE gate (skips structural/length) and >=3 W and >=3 L seeds -- branches failing this (the structural/length gates) return no_gate_signature and fall to inconclusive.
I2S and value_profile are both invisible in mutation_op (no lineage event) -- no descriptor of the overhead-drain hypothesis is proposed.

anti-synergy budget-diversion vs wrong-decoy-overcommit are the SAME observable when a concrete decoy literal exists (corpus pinned to wrong value); they are MERGED into decoy_overcommit_wrong_literal. They diverge only when there is NO decoy literal, in which case the branch is already in the non-discriminable bucket.
notes: COLLAPSE: the 3 prior clusters (overhead_drain / budget_diversion / wrong_literal_overcommit) reduce to ONE discriminable test + ONE non-discriminable bucket. Rationale: 'budget diversion toward competing CMPs' and 'overcommit to a wrong sibling literal' are indistinguishable in real corpus data WHEN a concrete decoy literal is namable -- both leave the vpc corpus pinned to a non-target value at the gate offset, which operand_enrichment's decoy_enrich measures directly. They are therefore merged into decoy_overcommit_wrong_literal. The pure non-literal-gate overhead-drain cluster (and any diversion case with no decoy literal) has no byte-level signature and only a global corpus-scale signal, which is confounded and non-attributable -> decidable:false -> inconclusive (G3 honesty). DISCRIMINABLE TARGETS: 8 harfbuzz branches with fixed-offset value/switch gates and on-disk corpora (5350,5623,5683,5761,6124_h0,6162,6210,6263); of these, the switch/codepoint gates with a clearly namable decoy (5623,5683,6124_h0,6263) are the cleanest, while the indirectly-computed script-enum gates (5350,5761,6162,6210) may return no_gate_signature if the script tag is not at a fixed input offset -> those fall to inconclusive. NON-DISCRIMINABLE: bloaty_301 (pointer-relation, no corpus), lcms_2137 (no corpus -- though its >0x09 version-byte gate WOULD be a clean decoy test if lcms had on-disk corpora; flagged as a corpus-coverage gap, not a mechanism gap), libpng_4072_h1 (derived length field, no corpus). G2: every test scores corpus byte frequencies, independent of the vpc resolve pattern that defined the shape.
